name: awesome-gbb
description: Microsoft GBB community skill bundles for the GitHub Copilot CLI ecosystem (Copilot CLI GA, Copilot Desktop App tech preview, VS Code agent mode preview, Claude Code). Three domain bundles install the right subset of the 34-skill catalog in one command.

plugins.name: awesome-gbb-basic
plugins.description: Cross-cutting GBB skills usable in any pre-sales or pilot engagement: research a customer, compose a digital-clone org brief, polish prose with the GBB voice, render Office-quality decks, auto-record narrated demos, manage shared IP catalog, bootstrap the Copilot CLI with 6 recommended MCP servers.

plugins.name: awesome-gbb-azure
plugins.description: Azure + Microsoft Foundry skills for hosted agents, RAG, MCP servers, evaluation, observability, governance (Citadel, AGT), cost analysis (PayGo vs PTU), tenant isolation, azd infra patterns, and Azure SRE Agent operator deployment. The full stack a GBB seller needs to scope, deploy, govern, and operate a Foundry-based pilot.

plugins.name: awesome-gbb-threadlight
plugins.description: End-to-end Threadlight engagement pipeline: design (SPEC + demo data factory), local test (Pattern 0 → 3 cinematic UI), deploy (Bicep + azd), safe-check gate, event triggers, HITL patterns, workspace UI, plus the foundry/azure skills the pipeline depends on. Self-contained — install this one plugin to run a Threadlight pilot.
